title: OpenClaw Security Risks: 6 Dangers of Autonomous AI Agents
summary: IBM Technology discusses OpenClaw security vulnerabilities in autonomous AI agents, covering six categories of risk including prompt injection and credential exposure. The video emphasizes how agent autonomy, tool access, and memory mechanisms create real-world security gaps and argues practitioners should adopt safer practices when deploying agentic systems.
